# Host Experience — Mobile Host Mode + Hotel Web Dashboard

## Host Experience Subsystem ({{PLATFORM_NAME}})

Two surfaces, one Supabase layer: **(7a)** Expo "host mode" for individual hosts, **(7b)** Next.js dashboard for hotels/property managers. Capabilities are identical; only UI density and bulk affordances differ.

> **Verification note:** I attempted to load `WebSearch`/`WebFetch` via `ToolSearch` to re-confirm current Chargily Pay v2 endpoints, Supabase RLS idioms, and Expo RTL APIs, but tool-schema loading was unavailable in this run. Claims below rest on the locked spec + knowledge to Jan 2026. Items I would re-verify before build are flagged **[VERIFY]**. The payments subsystem owns Chargily/Baridi specifics; this section only consumes payout/transaction reads.

---

### 1. Shared Host API surface (both surfaces call THIS, never raw UI-specific logic)

The contract is: **mutations that touch money, availability integrity, or workflow state go through `SECURITY DEFINER` RPCs**; plain reads/edits go through **RLS-guarded table access**. This guarantees the mobile toggle-host and the hotel manager get byte-identical behavior.

#### 1.1 Tables (RLS-guarded direct access)

| Table | Host-writable cols (draft phase) | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `host_profiles` | `display_name, bio, type` (`individual`/`hotel`), `payout_method`, `ccp_rip`, `baridimob_phone`, `id_document_path`, `verification_status` | One row per host account. `verification_status` host-read-only. |
| `properties` | `property_type_id, title_ar/_fr/_en, description_*, wilaya_code, commune_id, address_line, geo_lat, geo_lng, checkin_from, checkout_until, house_rules_*, cancellation_policy_id, instant_book, status` | `status` only host-settable to `draft`/`pending` (see RPC). |
| `room_types` | `property_id, name_ar/_fr/_en, base_occupancy, max_occupancy, count_total, base_price_dzd, size_sqm, bed_config` | Hotels: many rows/property. Individuals: usually 1 auto-created. |
| `property_photos` | `property_id, room_type_id?, storage_path, sort_order, is_cover` | Storage bucket `listing-photos`. |
| `property_amenities` | `property_id / room_type_id, amenity_id` | Join table; bulk replace on save. |
| `availability_calendar` | `room_type_id, date, status, price_override_dzd, min_stay, max_stay` | One row per room-type per date. Written via RPC for ranges (§1.2). |
| `rate_plans` | `room_type_id, label, kind` (`weekend`/`seasonal`/`base`), `date_start, date_end, weekday_mask, price_dzd, min_stay` | Seasonal/weekend rules; resolved into `availability_calendar` or at quote time. |
| `bookings` | host reads; writes only via RPC | — |
| `conversations`, `messages` | host reads own-property threads; inserts messages via RLS | — |
| `reviews`, `review_responses` | host reads received; inserts one response/review | — |
| `payouts`, `transactions` | **host read-only** | Written by payments Edge Functions + admin. |
| `host_team_members` | hotel owner/manager writable | Staff scoping (§4). |
| `host_analytics_daily` | host read-only | Materialized/rolled-up nightly (§1.3). |

#### 1.2 RPCs (`SECURITY DEFINER`, `search_path` pinned, owner-checked inside)

Naming: `rpc_host_*`. Every RPC re-checks `auth.uid()` ownership; it does NOT trust client-passed host IDs.

- `rpc_host_submit_listing(p_property_id)` → validates completeness (≥1 room type, ≥3 photos w/ cover, title in ≥1 locale, geo set, cancellation policy set), flips `draft`→`pending`, stamps `submitted_at`, enqueues admin-review notification. Rejects if not `draft`/`rejected`.
- `rpc_host_set_availability(p_room_type_id, p_date_start, p_date_end, p_status, p_price_override?, p_min_stay?, p_max_stay?, p_weekday_mask?)` → **the bulk-edit workhorse.** Upserts a date range in one call; `p_weekday_mask` lets "weekends only across summer" close-outs. Refuses to block/modify dates with an active confirmed booking. This single RPC powers mobile single-day taps AND web range drag-select.
- `rpc_host_upsert_rate_plan(...)` / `rpc_host_delete_rate_plan(p_rate_plan_id)`.
- `rpc_host_respond_reservation(p_booking_id, p_action, p_reason?)` — `p_action ∈ accept|decline`. Only for `instant_book=false` properties in `pending_host` state; transitions to `confirmed` or `declined`, triggers guest notification + (on accept) availability hold confirmation. Enforces request-expiry window.
- `rpc_host_modify_reservation(p_booking_id, p_new_checkin?, p_new_checkout?, p_new_room_type_id?)` — manager/owner only; re-prices, re-checks availability, writes audit row.
- `rpc_host_cancel_reservation(p_booking_id, p_reason)` — host-initiated cancel; routes to refund logic in payments layer per `cancellation_policy`.
- `rpc_host_reply_review(p_review_id, p_body)` — one response per review, immutable after 48h **[VERIFY policy window]**.
- `rpc_host_invite_staff(p_email, p_role, p_property_ids[])` / `rpc_host_revoke_staff(p_member_id)` / `rpc_host_accept_invite(p_token)` — hotel team mgmt (§4).
- `rpc_host_quote(p_room_type_id, p_checkin, p_checkout, p_guests)` → returns nightly breakdown (base/weekend/seasonal resolution), subtotal, fees, **commission preview**, host-net. Used by pricing previews on both surfaces so the host sees take-home before publishing.

#### 1.3 Edge Functions (server-cron / webhook, not direct UI calls)

- `payouts-rollup` (scheduled) — aggregates `transactions` of `confirmed`/`completed` bookings into `payouts` net of commission; computes `available_on` per payout-hold rule.
- `analytics-rollup` (nightly cron) — writes `host_analytics_daily` (views, booking count, occupancy %, ADR, revenue, conversion). Keeps heavy aggregation off the client and identical across surfaces.
- `listing-image-process` (Storage trigger) — on upload to `listing-photos`, generates resized/blurred variants, strips EXIF GPS (privacy), validates mime/size.
- Payments webhooks (Chargily/Baridi) are **owned by the payments subsystem**; they write `transactions`/`payouts` that this subsystem only reads. **[VERIFY]** Chargily Pay v2 webhook signature header + checkout API shape at build time.

---

### 2. (7a) Mobile host mode — Expo / React Native

**Entry:** Guest profile → toggle **"وضع المضيف / Mode hôte / Host mode"**. Toggle calls `rpc_host_profile_ensure()` (lazily creates `host_profiles` row, sets active role context). Navigation swaps to a host tab stack. RTL: all stacks wrapped so `I18nManager.isRTL` flips paddings/icons; chevrons use logical `start/end`. **[VERIFY]** current Expo guidance: set RTL via `I18nManager.forceRTL` + `expo-localization` `getLocales()`, app reload required on direction change.

#### 2.1 Listing creation wizard — `HostListingWizard` stack

Each step is its own screen; progress persisted to a `draft` `properties` row after every step (resumable). One `room_types` row auto-created for individual hosts (label "الإقامة كاملة / logement entier").

| # | Screen | Writes | Validation |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `WizardTypeScreen` | `properties.property_type_id`, `host_profiles.type=individual` | type required; creates draft row + auto room type |
| 2 | `WizardLocationScreen` (map pin) | `wilaya_code`, `commune_id`, `geo_lat/lng`, `address_line` | wilaya ∈ 58; pin inside Algeria bbox; commune belongs to wilaya |
| 3 | `WizardPhotosScreen` | `property_photos.*`, `is_cover` | ≥3 photos, exactly 1 cover, ≤ N max; upload to `listing-photos/{host}/{property}/` |
| 4 | `WizardBasicsScreen` | `title_ar/fr/en`, `description_*` | ≥1 locale title (primary = Arabic encouraged); length bounds |
| 5 | `WizardAmenitiesScreen` | `property_amenities` | from master `amenities`; none required |
| 6 | `WizardHouseRulesScreen` | `house_rules_*`, smoking/pets/parties flags | — |
| 7 | `WizardCheckinScreen` | `checkin_from`, `checkout_until` | checkout ≠ checkin; valid times |
| 8 | `WizardPricingScreen` | `room_types.base_price_dzd`; `rate_plans` (weekend/seasonal) | base > 0 DZD, integer dinars (no centimes); weekend/seasonal optional, ranges non-overlapping per kind. Shows `rpc_host_quote` net-of-commission preview |
| 9 | `WizardAvailabilityScreen` | `availability_calendar` via `rpc_host_set_availability` | default open N months; min/max stay sane (min≤max) |
| 10 | `WizardCancellationScreen` | `properties.cancellation_policy_id` | pick from preset policies (flexible/moderate/strict) |
| 11 | `WizardInstantBookScreen` | `properties.instant_book` | toggle; copy explains auto-accept |
| 12 | `WizardReviewSubmitScreen` | calls `rpc_host_submit_listing` | server-side completeness gate; on success → `pending`, show "قيد المراجعة" |

#### 2.2 Other mobile host screens

- `HostCalendarScreen` — month grid per room type. Tap day → bottom sheet: block/unblock, price override, min/max stay. Calls `rpc_host_set_availability` (single-day = 1-day range). Booked days locked. Price-override badge shows DZD.
- `HostReservationsScreen` — segmented: **Requests** (accept/decline via `rpc_host_respond_reservation`, countdown to expiry), **Upcoming**, **Past**. Detail → guest name/avatar, dates, guests, total, guest message, deep link to thread.
- `HostMessagesScreen` / `HostThreadScreen` — Realtime subscription on `messages` filtered to host's conversations; insert via RLS. Quick replies.
- `HostEarningsScreen` — two tabs: **Upcoming** (scheduled payouts, `available_on`) and **Paid** (history). Each payout expands to per-booking rows: gross DZD → commission (−X%) → **net DZD**. Reads `payouts` + `transactions`; numbers come from `payouts-rollup` (never client-computed).
- `HostReviewsScreen` — list of received reviews + rating; reply once via `rpc_host_reply_review`.
- `HostPerformanceScreen` — lightweight cards from `host_analytics_daily`: views (30d), bookings, occupancy %. No heavy charts (mobile).

---

### 3. (7b) Hotel / property-manager dashboard — Next.js (App Router)

Route group `app/(host)/dashboard/...`, guarded by middleware checking session + `host_team_members` role. All data via same RPCs/tables. Server Components for reads (RLS via per-request Supabase server client); Client Components for calendar/drag interactions. Locale segment `app/[locale]/(host)/...` with `dir={locale==='ar'?'rtl':'ltr'}` on `<html>`; Tailwind logical utilities (`ps-*`, `pe-*`, `ms-*`, `text-start`).

| Route | Screen | Backed by |
|---|---|---|
| `/dashboard` | **Overview** — today check-ins/outs, occupancy %, revenue (today/MTD), pending-action queue (review requests, unanswered messages, listings rejected) | `host_analytics_daily`, `bookings`, counts |
| `/dashboard/properties` | Property list (status badges draft/pending/approved/suspended) | `properties` |
| `/dashboard/properties/[id]` | Property editor — basics, location, photos, amenities, house rules, policy | `properties`, `property_photos`, `property_amenities` |
| `/dashboard/properties/[id]/room-types` | **Room-type manager** — per-type inventory (`count_total`), photos, amenities, base price | `room_types`, child photos/amenities |
| `/dashboard/properties/[id]/calendar` | **Rate & availability calendar** — multi-room-type grid, **drag-select date ranges**, BULK: set price / close-out / open / min-stay / max-stay across range; seasonal & weekend rate plans; weekday-mask | `rpc_host_set_availability` (range), `rpc_host_upsert_rate_plan` |
| `/dashboard/reservations` | Reservations table — filter by property/room-type/status/date, search by guest/confirmation code; row actions confirm/modify/cancel | `bookings`, `rpc_host_modify_reservation`, `rpc_host_cancel_reservation`, `rpc_host_respond_reservation` |
| `/dashboard/messages` | Inbox (Realtime), thread pane | `conversations`, `messages` |
| `/dashboard/reviews` | Reviews monitor — filter by rating/property, respond | `reviews`, `rpc_host_reply_review` |
| `/dashboard/analytics` | **Analytics** — occupancy, ADR, revenue over time, views→bookings conversion, top room types, review-trend; date-range + per-property filters; CSV export | `host_analytics_daily` |
| `/dashboard/payouts` | **Payouts** — statements list, each with commission breakdown, status (`pending`/`available`/`paid`), payout history; per-booking drilldown | `payouts`, `transactions` |
| `/dashboard/staff` | **Staff** — invite by email, assign role (reception/manager), scope to property set, revoke; pending invites | `host_team_members`, `rpc_host_invite_staff/revoke/accept` |
| `/dashboard/settings` | Host profile, payout method (CCP/RIP or BaridiMob), verification docs | `host_profiles` |

Bulk calendar UX: drag to select a date span (or pick weekday mask + season range) → side panel applies one `rpc_host_set_availability` call per affected room type. Optimistic UI, reconcile on RPC return; conflicts (booked dates) returned as a skipped-dates list.

---

### 4. Staff role scoping → Auth / RLS design

Roles live in **two layers**: account-level role on the JWT, and **per-property team membership** for hotels.

**`host_team_members`**: `id, owner_host_id (→host_profiles), member_user_id (→auth.users), role enum('owner','manager','reception'), property_ids uuid[] (NULL = all of owner's properties), status enum('invited','active','revoked'), invite_token, invited_at, accepted_at`.

**Capability matrix:**

| Capability | owner / host_individual | manager | reception |
|---|---|---|---|
| Edit property/room-types/photos/pricing | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Calendar availability & close-outs | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (no price edits) |
| Accept/decline/modify/cancel reservations | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ (no cancel w/ refund) |
| Messages | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| View payouts / financials | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |
| Analytics | ✅ | ✅ | partial (occupancy only) |
| Invite/revoke staff | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Submit listing for review | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |

**RLS implementation:**

- JWT carries `role` (guest/host_*/admin) via Supabase Auth; account-type gates host routes. Fine-grained hotel scoping is **data-driven**, not JWT-baked (staff change without re-issuing tokens).
- Helper SQL: `auth_host_can_access(p_property_id, p_min_role)` `STABLE` function — returns true if `auth.uid()` is the owner OR an `active` `host_team_members` row whose `role` ≥ `p_min_role` and (`property_ids IS NULL OR p_property_id = ANY(property_ids)`).
- Example policy on `properties` UPDATE:
  `USING (auth_host_can_access(id, 'manager')) WITH CHECK (auth_host_can_access(id, 'manager'))`.
- `availability_calendar` write policy → `auth_host_can_access(room_type→property_id, 'reception')`.
- `payouts`/`transactions` SELECT → owner/manager only (`auth_host_can_access(property_id,'manager')`); reception excluded.
- Reservation **cancel-with-refund** is gated inside `rpc_host_cancel_reservation` (re-checks role ≥ manager), even though reception may modify — capability matrix enforced in RPC body, not just UI.
- `host_team_members` itself: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE restricted to `owner` (`owner_host_id` maps to `auth.uid()`'s host profile); `super_admin` bypass via separate admin policy.

**Invite flow:** `rpc_host_invite_staff` inserts `invited` row + `invite_token`, emails deep link (`{{PLATFORM_NAME}}://staff-invite?token=` for mobile / `/staff/accept?token=` web). Invitee (existing or new account) calls `rpc_host_accept_invite(p_token)` → flips to `active`, binds `member_user_id`. Mobile reception staff can use host mode too; same RPC layer, capability matrix narrows their UI.

---

### 5. Why this satisfies "capabilities match, only UI differs"

Both surfaces are thin clients over the same **table-RLS + `rpc_host_*` + Edge Function** layer. A single-day price tap on mobile and a 90-day summer close-out drag on web both resolve to `rpc_host_set_availability`. Earnings (mobile) and payouts (web) both read the `payouts-rollup` output. Anything money/availability/workflow-sensitive is server-enforced, so the mobile toggle-host cannot do less or more than the hotel manager — only the ergonomics (single-tap vs bulk drag, cards vs charts) change.
